item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 181630Z AUTO 13003KT CAVOK 29/16 Q1014 TEMPO 27015G25KT 4500 -TSRA FEW090CB SCT100TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 181100Z 1812/1912 15008KT CAVOK PROB40 TEMPO 1813/1818 27015G25KT 4500 -TSRA FEW090CB SCT100TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1813/1816 26020G35KT 2500 -TSRAGS BKN090CB PROB30 TEMPO 1900/1904 25015G25KT 4000 -TSRA SCT100CB
